arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Brentford injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Brentford.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Brentford unusual kick-off time explained
arts.sum: It’s a slot that is unusual for Premier League games, but this weekend will see it used for two clashes. Instead, the reason for the different kick-off is due to the journey that Chelsea had for their midweek UEFA Conference League game.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Brentford - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicting how Chelsea could line up for their Premier League clash against Brentford on Sunday evening.

arts.ttl: Is Premier League title race between Liverpool and Chelsea?
arts.sum: Final Score's Ellen White and Glenn Murray discuss the latest results in the Premier League and what they mean in the title race for Liverpool, Chelsea and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Premier League club interested in signing £80k-a-week Chelsea player on loan, he may be allowed to leave

arts.sum: Chelsea are having a brilliant season so far in the Premier League. Indeed, the Blues are flying high and they sitting second in the table...

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed clear title verdict as Enzo Maresca transfer hint dropped
arts.sum: "They are maybe even more in-form than Liverpool, even though they are top of the league," Frank said in his pre-match press conference. Brentford manager Thomas Frank has heaped praise on Chelsea - suggesting they could be the "best team in the Premier League right now".

arts.ttl: Puma launch hilarious Marc Cucurella advert in response to Chelsea star throwing his £220 boots in the BIN after slipping twice in the Blues' 4-3 win over Spurs
arts.sum: Puma have hilariously poked fun at themselves in their latest campaign after previously facing a potential marketing disaster over Marc Cucurella 's actions in Chelsea's win over Spurs.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea are now looking at 'outstanding' Champions League star as they're not happy with one position
arts.sum: Chelsea’s recruiters are looking at a Champions League star as a potential transfer target for 2025. In general, Chelsea is a club moving in an...

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea move for €100m Brazilian wonderkid
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are among the clubs to have enquired about Vitor Reis again in recent days, according to Brazilian media. According to the Brazilian edition of GOAL, Arsenal, Chelsea, Real Madrid and Inter have all made new contact with Palmeiras 'in recent days' to gather information on Reis.
